pact_boons.name: Pact of the Blade
pact_boons.description: You can use your action to create a pact weapon in your empty hand. You are proficient with it while you wield it, and can use your Charisma for its attack and damage rolls.

pact_boons.name: Pact of the Chain
pact_boons.description: You learn the find familiar spell and can cast it as a ritual. Your familiar can take special forms (imp, pseudodragon, quasit, or sprite) and you can forgo an attack to let it use its reaction to attack.

pact_boons.name: Pact of the Tome
pact_boons.description: Your patron gives you a Book of Shadows holding three cantrips of your choice from any class's spell list, which you can cast at will.

pact_boons.name: Pact of the Talisman
pact_boons.description: Your patron gives you an amulet. While you wear it, you can add a d4 to a failed ability check a number of times per long rest equal to your proficiency bonus.

invocations.name: Agonizing Blast
invocations.description: When you cast eldritch blast, add your Charisma modifier to the damage it deals on a hit.

invocations.name: Eldritch Spear
invocations.description: When you cast eldritch blast, its range is 300 feet.

invocations.name: Repelling Blast
invocations.description: When you hit a creature with eldritch blast, you can push it up to 10 feet away from you in a straight line.

invocations.name: Armor of Shadows
invocations.description: You can cast mage armor on yourself at will, without expending a spell slot or material components.

invocations.name: Beast Speech
invocations.description: You can cast speak with animals at will, without expending a spell slot.

invocations.name: Beguiling Influence
invocations.description: You gain proficiency in the Deception and Persuasion skills.

invocations.name: Devil's Sight
invocations.description: You can see normally in darkness, both magical and nonmagical, to a distance of 120 feet.

invocations.name: Eldritch Sight
invocations.description: You can cast detect magic at will, without expending a spell slot.

invocations.name: Fiendish Vigor
invocations.description: You can cast false life on yourself at will as a 1st-level spell, without expending a spell slot or material components.

invocations.name: Mask of Many Faces
invocations.description: You can cast disguise self at will, without expending a spell slot.

invocations.name: Misty Visions
invocations.description: You can cast silent image at will, without expending a spell slot or material components.

invocations.name: Thief of Five Fates
invocations.description: You can cast bane once using a warlock spell slot. You can't do so again until you finish a long rest.

invocations.name: Book of Ancient Secrets
invocations.description: You can inscribe magic ritual spells into your Book of Shadows and cast them as rituals.

invocations.name: Voice of the Chain Master
invocations.description: You can communicate telepathically with your familiar and perceive through its senses as long as you are on the same plane.

invocations.name: Thirsting Blade
invocations.description: You can attack with your pact weapon twice, instead of once, whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.

invocations.name: Lifedrinker
invocations.description: When you hit a creature with your pact weapon, it takes extra necrotic damage equal to your Charisma modifier (minimum 1).

invocations.name: One with Shadows
invocations.description: When you are in an area of dim light or darkness, you can use your action to become invisible until you move or take an action or reaction.

invocations.name: Bewitching Whispers
invocations.description: You can cast compulsion once using a warlock spell slot. You can't do so again until you finish a long rest.

invocations.name: Sculptor of Flesh
invocations.description: You can cast polymorph once using a warlock spell slot. You can't do so again until you finish a long rest.

invocations.name: Ascendant Step
invocations.description: You can cast levitate on yourself at will, without expending a spell slot or material components.

invocations.name: Eldritch Mind
invocations.description: You have advantage on Constitution saving throws that you make to maintain concentration.

invocations.name: Lessons of the First Ones
invocations.description: You have received esoteric lessons from your patron. You gain one Origin feat of your choice. (This invocation can be taken more than once.)

invocations.name: Otherworldly Leap
invocations.description: You always have the jump spell prepared. You can cast it without expending a spell slot.

invocations.name: Investment of the Chain Master
invocations.description: Your Pact of the Chain familiar gains a flying and swimming speed of 40 feet, and its attacks count as magical. As a bonus action you can command it to take the Attack action, and you can give it temporary hit points equal to your Warlock level.

invocations.name: Gift of the Protectors
invocations.description: When a creature whose name is written in your Book of Shadows is reduced to 0 hit points but not killed outright, that creature instead drops to 1 hit point. Once used, this invocation can't be used again until you finish a long rest.
